description_long: This is a pair of heavy-duty bolt cutters, featuring long, straight handles coated in a red finish with black rubberized grips for enhanced comfort and control. The jaws are robust and made of metallic steel, designed for cutting through thick metal rods, bolts, or chains. The cutting head is silver-gray and features a compound jaw mechanism, providing increased leverage and cutting force. The handles are straight and elongated, allowing for two-handed operation and maximum force application. The pivot joint is prominent and reinforced, ensuring durability during high-stress use. The overall construction is solid and utilitarian, suitable for demanding urban maintenance or emergency scenarios.
description: A robust pair of bolt cutters with long red handles, black rubber grips, and a heavy-duty steel cutting head. Designed for cutting metal objects in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat cutting jaws and the V-shaped handle alignment.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the handles and the thickness of the cutting head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jaws and the parallel black handle grips.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the straight handles and the profile of the jaw mechanism.
attribute_handle_type: Long, straight handles with black rubberized grips for comfort and slip resistance.
attribute_jaw_design: Thick, flat-edged cutting jaws with a compound leverage design, optimized for cutting metal rods and bolts.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed, heavy-duty compound pivot joint for increased cutting force; not adjustable.
attribute_grip_pattern: Rubberized grips with a smooth, slightly textured finish for secure handling.
